originalTitle: Kidnapping of foreigners soars in Africa's lawless Sahel region
title: Keeping Everyone Safe in Our Big African Home!
content:
Hello, My Little African Friends!

Welcome, my bright-eyed, wonderful friends! I'm your special news reporter, and I'm here to tell you something important. Africa is our amazing home, full of sunshine, cool animals, and lots of lovely people. We always want everyone to feel safe and happy here, especially our friends who come to visit from far away lands. Sometimes, grown-ups talk about big things that happen, and I'm here to explain one of them in a way you can understand.

Our Big Home: Africa!

Did you know Africa is a giant continent? It's so big, with so many different countries and cultures, like a giant puzzle with many beautiful pieces! We have deserts, big rivers, tall mountains, and green forests. We have lions, elephants, giraffes, and so many other cool animals. It's a truly special place to live and play. Did you know? Africa is the second-largest continent in the world! Only Asia is bigger. It has 54 countries!

Meeting New Friends from Far Away

Sometimes, people come to visit Africa from other countries. We call these visitors 'foreigners' or 'guests'. They come to see our beautiful places, learn about our cultures, and sometimes even help build schools or hospitals. They are like new friends joining our big African family for a little while. We always want our guests to feel welcome and safe, just like when a new friend comes to your home to play.

What is the Sahel Region?

Africa is super big, right? There's a very long, special part of Africa called the Sahel. Imagine a really long belt across the middle of North Africa, right below the big Sahara Desert. This 'belt' is the Sahel! It has amazing sandy areas, thorny bushes, and very special trees called baobab trees that look like they're growing upside down! Many friendly people live there, and they often herd goats and camels. Did you know? The word 'Sahel' means 'coast' or 'shore' in Arabic, because it feels like the 'shore' of the big Sahara desert!

Sometimes Friends Go Missing

Last year, in 2025, something sad happened. More of our visiting friends, the foreigners, went missing in the Sahel region than in other years. This means they were taken away, and their own grown-ups couldn't find them for a while. It's like when your toy goes missing, but much, much bigger and sadder because it's a person. When people go missing, it makes everyone feel worried and sad. It's important to remember that these things don't happen everywhere in Africa, and lots of grown-ups are working very hard to make sure our friends are found and everyone is safe. This news makes us extra careful and determined to protect our continent and its visitors.

Why Does This Happen?

Sometimes, in certain parts of the world, including some areas of the Sahel, things can get a bit tricky. There can be grown-ups who do not follow the rules and cause problems. These grown-ups might make places feel unsafe for a while. They might take people away for different reasons, which is not kind or right. This is why we need strong grown-ups like police and community helpers to keep an eye on things. It’s not because Africa is a scary place! It’s because a few people do bad things in some areas. But remember, good people are always trying to fix these problems and bring peace back to these places.

How Grown-ups Are Helping

When our visiting friends go missing, many, many grown-ups get together to help. Police officers, soldiers, and special community leaders work super hard. They try to find the missing people and make sure they can go home safely to their families. They also work to make sure that the places where people went missing become safer for everyone. They talk to each other, make plans, and look for clues, just like detectives! Did you know? Many countries in Africa work together, sharing information and helping each other, like a big team, to solve these problems!

How We Can All Stay Safe

Even though grown-ups are working hard, it’s good for all of us to remember simple safety rules. Always stay close to your grown-up, whether it's your mom, dad, auntie, uncle, or teacher. If you ever feel lost, or if someone you don't know tries to talk to you or take you away, remember to shout for help and run to a trusted grown-up as fast as you can. It's always okay to ask for help! Did you know? Your voice is very powerful! If you need help, shouting can alert a grown-up nearby.

Our Big Family Working Together

Africa is a place of amazing communities. People living close to each other, helping one another, sharing food, and looking out for their neighbours. This is a very strong part of our African culture. When something happens, everyone comes together. We believe in Ubuntu, which means 'I am because we are'. It means we are all connected, and we care for each other. So, when a friend goes missing, it hurts all of us, and we all want to help. Did you know? In many African cultures, children are taught to respect elders and look out for younger ones, creating a strong sense of community!

A Hope for All Our Friends

So, while it's sad that some of our visiting friends went missing in 2025, it's important to know that many good people are working very hard. They want to find everyone and make sure that Africa remains a welcoming and safe place for all our friends, whether they live here or just come to visit. We hope that soon, everyone will be safe and happy, and we can all enjoy our beautiful continent together, full of peace and joy! Thank you for listening, my wonderful friends!

title: At least 55 Ghanaians killed in Russia-Ukraine war, minister says
content: This is the highest number of confirmed casualties from a single African country in the Ukraine-Russia war.

originalTitle: Balen Shah: Rapper, mayor, Nepal’s next prime minister?
title: From Cool Songs to Helping a Whole Country: Meet Balen Shah!
content:
Hello from Africa, Awesome Friends!

Jambo, amazing friends! It’s your kid-friendly news reporter from Africa, here to share a super exciting story from a land far, far away! We’re going to fly our imaginations all the way to a beautiful country called Nepal. Nepal has very tall mountains and kind people. And today, we’re talking about a very special person named Balen Shah.

Who is Balen Shah?

Imagine a person who loves music, sings cool songs that make everyone want to dance, and wears awesome sunglasses! That’s Balen Shah! He is a very energetic and friendly man from Nepal. He is known for his amazing music and for wanting to help his country grow. Did you know? Nepal is famous for having the world's tallest mountain, Mount Everest! It's so high that its peak touches the clouds!

A Star Who Sings!

Balen is what we call a 'rapper'. Rapping is a special way of singing where you say words very quickly, almost like talking fast, but to a fun beat and rhythm. His songs are super popular in Nepal, and many kids and grown-ups love to listen to them. They make people feel happy and want to move their feet. His music isn't just fun; sometimes he sings about important things too. He talks about making cities cleaner and helping people. This makes his songs special because they are not just for dancing, but also for thinking about good changes.

Helping His City as Mayor

But Balen is not just a singer! Before wanting to help his whole country, he was a very important helper for his city. He was the 'Mayor' of Kathmandu. Kathmandu is the biggest and most important city in Nepal, full of busy streets and lovely homes. Being a mayor is a very big job. It means you are in charge of making sure the city works well for everyone. Balen worked very hard to make Kathmandu a better place for all its people. He wanted clean streets and happy parks.

What Does a Mayor Do?

Think of your own town or city. A mayor is like the captain of that city! They make sure that the streets are clean and safe for everyone. They help build nice parks where you can play with your friends. They also make sure schools are good places to learn and grow. Balen, as mayor, tried his best to listen to what people needed. He wanted to make sure that children had good playgrounds and that families had clean water. He tried to fix problems like garbage on the streets and make sure the city looked beautiful. Did you know? A mayor's job is to look after their city, just like a family leader looks after their home!

Now, a Bigger Dream!

After being a great mayor for his city, Balen Shah now has an even bigger dream! He wants to help not just Kathmandu, but the *entire country* of Nepal. He wants to be the 'Prime Minister' of Nepal. This is a very, very important job. It means he wants to be the main leader for all the people in Nepal. It's like going from being the captain of one team to being the captain of the whole league! It's a huge step for him, and many people are very excited about his new goal.

What Does a Prime Minister Do?

A Prime Minister is like the leader of the entire country. They help make the most important decisions for everyone, for all the families and all the children. They work to make the whole country a happy, safe, and fair place for everyone. They think about things like making sure there are enough schools for all kids, building good hospitals for when people are sick, and helping farmers grow food. It’s a job that needs a lot of thinking, listening, and hard work to help millions of people. Did you know? A Prime Minister often works in a very special building where they meet with other important people to make decisions for the country!

Why Are People Excited?

People are very excited about Balen Shah because he is different. He is a young man who started with music, and now he wants to lead his whole country. He brings new ideas and a lot of energy to solving problems. He has shown that he cares about people and wants to make their lives better. His sunglasses and his songs are cool, but his desire to help everyone in Nepal is even cooler! People believe he can bring fresh ideas and make big changes for the good of his country.

Helping Nepal Grow!

Balen Shah wants to help Nepal grow stronger and happier. He wants to make sure all children have a chance to go to school and learn. He wants to build more good roads and make sure everyone has clean drinking water. He dreams of a bright future for all the people of Nepal. So, from singing cool songs to wanting to lead an entire nation, Balen Shah is a name to remember! We’ll keep an eye on him from here in Africa. It's wonderful to see young people wanting to make a big difference in their countries. Stay curious, my amazing friends, and keep dreaming big!
summary: Balen Shah, a popular rapper known for his songs and sunglasses, was once the mayor of Kathmandu and now dreams of becoming the Prime Minister to help the entire country of Nepal.
whyMatters: This story matters because it shows how someone who started with music can use their energy and new ideas to help their city and even their whole country, inspiring everyone to dream big and work for a better future.
